M(f)end,function(Y,s)local M=c(s)local O=function(O,Q)return F(Y,{O,Q},s,M)end return O end return(n(12384270-(-566367),{}))(M(f))end)(getfenv and getfenv()or _ENV,unpack or table[s(304340-296752)],newproxy,setmetatable,getmetatable,select,{...})end)(...)
